item.title: Burger bombs
item.description: Garlic Parmesan Cheeseburger Bombs Ingredients: 1 lb ground beef 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese 1/2 cup cream cheese, softened 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp onion powder Salt and pepper, to taste 1 can (16 oz) refrigerated biscuit dough 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese 2 tbsp butter, melted Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish) Instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. In a skillet over medium heat, brown the ground beef until fully cooked. Drain any excess grease. Add garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Mix in the cream cheese and shredded cheddar cheese until well combined, then remove from heat. Open the can of biscuit dough and separate it into individual biscuits. Flatten each biscuit into a circle. Place a spoonful of the beef and cheese mixture in the center of each flattened biscuit. Fold the dough over the filling and pinch the edges to seal completely. In a small bowl, mix melted butter and grated Parmesan cheese. Brush the tops of the cheeseburger bombs with the garlic Parmesan mixture. Arrange the bombs on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown. Let the bombs cool slightly before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley for a pop of color! Enjoy these delicious, cheesy bites with a touch of garlic and Parmesan!
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
what kind of hornet/wasp (?) is that?
mmm hmm
reasons
they say i never do one for the ladies
i love the castle and pirate ones from my era. but havent they re-released some?
i will defend bic to the death, 1 of their lighters lasts me months and i smoke a good bit of weed
how to fold ingredients
accurate
wait what
i would die for cheezit
nope
no thank you
gross
he finally found inner peas
i would've wanted that as a kid just for the gun
yeah. all of those
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Transition Timeline 10 yrs/ thriving
item.description:
10 years ago I was ready to leave this life, having been born with a brain that did not match my body… I decided to give myself one last chance and seek help.
This is me today. No filters, just ten years of MTF HRT and the drive to live my best life. This is the first time in my life I have felt happy, and whole, and like myself.
item.dc:creator: SlanderousLici

item.title: The original zero suit Samus
item.description:
For those too young to remember the original Metroid games, the green haired, pink/magenta leotard outfit was from the first Metroid game. If you entered your name as "Justin Bailey" it would let you play the game in that outfit. The name itself is kind of a secondary Easter Egg, since the word "bailey" is another word for swimsuit. So the name basically means "just in swimsuit". Cosplay by Phavorianne https://www.acparadise.com/acp/display.php?a=72
The black two piece outfit was originally a reward for beating the second Metroid game within a certain amount of time. At the end of the game you would get a screen showing Samus posing. If you beat the game within a certain time it would show her take off her helmet, and if you got an even better time it would show her without her armor, wearing this casual outfit of hers. (The outfit made appearances in later games with changes to the color and style.)
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Unhinged dumping without a theme because everything sucks part two.
item.description:
My second post. I don't plan on doing this daily.
I plan on at least doing one dump a day on Sunday and perhaps other stuff sprinkled in.
Perhaps I'll do other stuff as well if people want it.
Anyway, enjoy the content that's been rotting on my phone for years (Which is why some of it will be older).
item.dc:creator: ShadeTc

item.title: Scientists find a 35,000-year-old saber-toothed kitten in the Siberian permafrost
item.description: "An "almost perfectly preserved" saber-toothed cub has been unearthed in Russia's Sakha Republic, 35,000 years after it died. The cat is of the species Homotherium latidens, a distant relative of the more familiar Smilodon." CLONE THE KITTY! https://www.npr.org/2024/11/16/nx-s1-5193845/35000-year-old-kitten-siberia-frozen
item.dc:creator: jarable
